ideals: I addressed challenges with diplomacy, positivity, or empathy
I expressed my heritage, background, or beliefs through my actions
I learned how someone or something was broken
system.secondWind: You only regain effort from bond powers, camping, or interludes.

specialAbility.name: Special Ability
specialAbility.effect: You can allow someone else to regain 1 effort by spending 1 effort.

powers.name: Push Through
powers.description: You can take 1 strain instead of spending effort to take aid actions (cannot be reduced or ignored).

powers.name: Divine Luck
powers.description: When you take strain as a consequence, roll 1d6. On 6, reduce the strain to 0 (even critical strain).

powers.name: Illuminate
powers.description: Your actions have +1 boon or increased effect (choose) with or against characters that trust you.

powers.name: Untangle
powers.description: When you help someone else lift burdens, increase their segments healed by +1, and heal 1 segment yourself.

powers.name: Pangloss
powers.description: When you fail a desperate action, your next action can be pushed without spending effort.

powers.name: A Better Way
powers.description: When you study how something is hurt or broken, or tinker to fix something, get +1d or increased effect. Works without effect loss on: I person or small object. II group or large object. III whole town or massive object.

powers.name: Mender
powers.description: 2/session - Charm or tinker to heal someone's strain. 0-3 1 effort to heal 1. 4-5 1. 6 2. 6,6 4.

powers.name: Encourage
powers.description: 2/session - Use aid without spending effort or exposing yourself to consequences.

powers.name: Iron Cutting
powers.description: At end of each interlude, tick 2 segments total on any ambition, project, or ritual clock, even another character's.

powers.name: Heart Forge
powers.description: 1/session - Increase the effect of your next Tinker action to superpowered.

powers.name: Gambit of the Forge Titan
powers.description: Take a power from another Bond.

gearKits.name: Adventurer's Kit
items: Lantern, pack, bedroll, rope, flint and tinder, journal, rations, cooking pot, knife, canvas tent

gearKits.name: Mending Kit
items: Healing ointment, light reading, snacks, bandages, blanket, splint, salve, blight remedies, apron, clean gloves, holy icon, copious sweets

gearKits.name: Hearth Kit
items: Great cooking pot, oversized coat, bright lantern, extra ingredients, seasoning, firewood, spacious tent, arkentech hot plate and igniter

gearKits.name: Work Kit
items: Goggles, sandwich, vials, weak acid, metal augur, heavy toolbox, repurposed arkentech doodad (single use)
